subject: {{sender.contact_name}} has sent you a quote on Ideal4Finance
preheader: Follow this email to view your quote and begin the process of getting approved for finance

rows.text: {{sender.contact_name}} has sent you a quote on Ideal4Finance. Click below to view the quote and get apply for finance.

body.text: Ideal4Finance makes it easy to get tradespeople on finance. Flexible plans, quick approval.

rows.text: We help you get trusted tradespeople in to do the job on finance. With our flexible finance options you can choose the plan that's right for you, apply, and get approved in minutes.
Apply for finance in just 2 minutes
Choose the rate and terms that are right for you

body.title: 5,000+ jobs financed and counting
body.review: Great customer service, quick application process and Elliott called to check I was happy with the products the finance was covering.

sms: Hey {{receiver.contact_name}}! You've just been sent a job on Ideal4Finance from {{sender.contact_name}}. Check your emails for more information.
